primary_accounting_issue: Eligibility of intragroup monetary items (dividend receivable) to be designated as hedged items in hedge accounting for foreign exchange risk under IFRS

primary_authority.reason: IFRS 9 defines which items can be designated as hedged items for hedge accounting purposes, including the requirement for external parties and the exception for intragroup monetary items

supporting_authority.reason: IFRIC 16 clarifies that the exception for intragroup monetary items applies only to net investment hedges and should not be applied by analogy to other types of hedge accounting

peripheral_authority.reason: IAS 32 deals with non-financial item contracts and settlement provisions, not directly relevant to hedge accounting eligibility of intragroup monetary items

treatment_families.family: Eligibility of intragroup monetary items as hedged items for foreign currency risk
Scope of exception for intragroup items in hedge accounting

approaches.label: Intragroup monetary item eligible in net investment hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 paragraph 6.3.6 explicitly permits foreign currency risk of intragroup monetary items to qualify as hedged item in consolidated financial statements when FX exposure is not fully eliminated on consolidation

approaches.label: Intragroup monetary item not eligible for hedges other than net investment hedges
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRIC 16 paragraph 8 clarifies that the exception for intragroup items applies only to net investment hedges and should not be applied by analogy to other hedge types
